properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One day I heard the ancient story Of a cross on a hill far away And now I've a friend up in glory And He’s only a prayer away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, He never would say: 'I'm too busy today’ Every tear, every care, He's promised He will share And although He's the Lord of all glory Yet He's only a prayer away

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes I don't feel much like praying, But He speaks words of love just the same And deep in my soul there starts flowing Living waters, songs of praise to His name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If I keep the cross e’er before me, As I die I will live day by day. If I sin, If I fall, He'll restore me For He's only a prayer away.
